rulings.Case Title: HC 650 SACRAMENTO LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. STARCITY PROPERTIES INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT STARCITY PROPERTIES, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to January 3, 2020. Parties are ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative pleadings, and opposition. The Court is in receipt of the courtesy copies of reply. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOMEI FENG ET AL VS. JIAWEI JIAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to December 18, 2019 per stipulation and order. Parties are ordered to provide a single-sided copy of the Stipulation and Order for execution at the time of the hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY YOUNG ET AL VS. OLIVIA NAVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF GREGORY YOUNG, TIFFANY YOUNG Motion For Preliminary Injunction Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to provide current pictures of the common areas, including the stairwell and all areas containing shelves installed by the Defendant (with or without permission). Pictures to be delivered by 8:30 a.m. on December 5, 2019 to ogrecova@sftc.org. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY YOUNG ET AL VS. OLIVIA NAVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Gregory Young And Tiffany Young'S Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp Motion) (Ccp Sec. 425.16)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF GREGORY YOUNG, TIFFANY YOUNG Notice Of Plaintiffs Gregory Young And Tiffany Young'S Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp Motion) (Ccp Sec. 425.16) Motion is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden under the first prong of ANTI-SLAPP. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. PATRICIA MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT PATRICIA MARTINEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to December 24, 2019 for Plaintiff to provide a courtesy copy of the opposition in compliance with SFRL 2.7B by no later than December 12, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.
